summary: Phase 8 Save Scenario bug fix verification completed successfully. All frontend requirements verified: Save Scenario button correctly enables after scenario run, dialog opens with proper inputs, scenario saves successfully, and saved scenarios list with Load/Delete buttons. No console errors detected.
passed_tests: Save Scenario button is disabled before running scenario
Save Scenario button becomes enabled after scenario completes (15s)
Clicking Save Scenario opens dialog with label input (data-testid='save-scenario-label')
Filling label and confirming saves scenario successfully
Toast message 'Scenario saved' appears after save
Saved scenarios are listed (3 scenarios found)
Each saved scenario has Load and Delete buttons
No 'Cannot read properties of undefined' console errors during scenario flow
